You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Ms. Priyanka Bamne is working as Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Engineering, Her area of research are Internet of Things and Networking. Education and Qualification: S. No. Degree Specialization Year University/Board 1 B.E Information Technology 2013 RGPV 2 Mtech Computer Science 2016 IIT Bombay Work Experience: S.NO. Designation Department Employer Name Duration of Employment From To 1 Content Development Executive Questome Pvt. Lmt 3 months 2 Senior Engineer Finance Technology Oxigen Pvt. Lmt 6 months 3 Assistant Professor Computer Engineering SGSITS Indore 03-07-2017 Till Date Research Details: Ms. Priyanka Bamneis doing research in the field of IoT and networking She has Guided various research based projects to B.E, and M.E Actively involved in doing research since 2013. She is mentor of Students computer club and also she is a sports person.
